data_sources: CoinGecko API - Real-time prices and market data
data_gaps: Exchange inflow/outflow: Requires Glassnode premium or CryptoQuant subscription
Whale tracking: Requires Whale Alert API key for real-time alerts
Funding rates: Requires CoinGlass or Bybt premium subscription
Options flow: Requires Deribit or Derive (Lyra) data access
Order book depth: Requires exchange API access (Coinbase Pro, Binance)
recommended_upgrades: Glassnode Basic Plan ($29/mo) for on-chain metrics
CoinGlass Pro ($20/mo) for funding rates and liquidations
